bazaarutils.config.separator.introductor: Thank you for installing Bazaar Utils! This mod provides Quality of Life features for the Hypixel Bazaar.
bazaarutils.config.bazaar_flipper_accoun:
The tier of your Bazaar Flipper Account Upgrade, which is factored in on tax calculation and current order limits.

Your Bazaar Flipper level can be upgraded by talking to Elizabeth at the Community Center in the SkyBlock Hub.
bazaarutils.config.chat.category.descrip: Configurations for the chat features of the mod
bazaarutils.config.chat.useless_bazaar_n: Removes specific transient messages sent to chat when interacting with the Bazaar to reduce clutter.
A list of messages and notifications to block from chat.
bazaarutils.config.chat.stash_messages_r: Removes chat messages reminding you to pick up items from your stash.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.category.desc: Configurations for the buttons to be injected/handled by the mod
bazaarutils.config.buttons.separator.mod: Adds buttons to inventory screens for quick access to mod features.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.mod_buttons.d: Global toggle to enable or disable all Mod Buttons.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.open_settings: Adds a button to selected menus for quick access to the mod's settings.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.open_orders.d:
Adds a button to selected menus for quick access to your orders page.

Requires an active Booster Cookie.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.button:widget: Whether the button will be enabled.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.separator.con: Adds helper buttons to specific container interfaces.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.cancel_order_: Adds a button to unfilled order/offer pages to cancel the order and immediately search for the item again.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.bookmarks.sep: Item Bookmarks allow you to quickly search for specific items on the Bazaar.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.bookmarks.ope: Configures the button on selected menus that quickly searches for the bookmarked item.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.bookmarks.tog: Adds a button to item pages to toggle whether the item is bookmarked for quick access.
bazaarutils.config.buttons.button:contai: Whether the button will be enabled.
The container slot where the button will be placed.
bazaarutils.config.inventory.category.de: Configurations for the inventory features of the mod
bazaarutils.config.inventory.instant_sel: Locks the Bazaar's Instant Sell button based on inventory or action criteria to prevent accidental sales.
The number of clicks required on the Instant Sell button to confirm the action.
Manage the rules for the Instant Sell Restrictions feature
The name of the item that, if present, will lock Instant Sell.
The quantity of coins or items required to trigger the lock.
Determines if the restriction applies to total coin value or item quantity.
Rules checking numeric conditions (e.g., total items or coins) to restrict Instant Sell.
Rules checking specific item names or types to restrict Instant Sell.
Highlights items in your inventory that would be sold by the Instant Sell button.
bazaarutils.config.inventory.order_statu: Highlights the status of your Bazaar Orders by coloring the items with representative colors.
The highlight color for orders that are currently the best market offer.
The highlight color for orders that match the current market price.
The highlight color for orders that have been outbid.
bazaarutils.config.overlays.category.des: Configurations for the overlays created by the mod
bazaarutils.config.overlays.price_charts: Adds a link to Bazaar item tooltips for quick access to market price charts.
Whether to show price charts in tooltips when outside of a Bazaar menu.
bazaarutils.config.overlays.bazaar_limit:
Displays your daily Bazaar Limit status on Bazaar screens.

Profiles are limited to 15,000,000,000.00 coins in tradeable orders/offers per day.
bazaarutils.config.notifications.categor: Configurations for the notifications pushed by the mod
bazaarutils.config.notifications.order_n: Enables notifications related to the status of your Bazaar orders.
Configures the notification shown when your order is outbid.
Configures the notification shown when your order is filled.
bazaarutils.config.notifications.notific: Whether the notification will be produced.
bazaarutils.config.developer.category.de: Developer configurations & toggleable tools of the mod
bazaarutils.config.developer.enabled.des: Global toggle for all developer features and utilities.
bazaarutils.config.developer.debug_messa: Configures debug messages sent to chat regarding mod routines and state
